case_title: UNIFUND CCR LLC VS. KRIDA N MOSHE ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-30-2020 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF UNIFUND CCR LLC AS TO DEFENDANT MOSHE, KRIDA N DOES 1 THROUGH 15 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-04-2020
